summary: Descriptive overview of mensrea in substantive law: purpose, knowledge, recklessness, negligence (MPC hierarchy).
key_points: purpose is a fundamental concept in criminal law.
Legal standards for mensrea are established through case law and statutory interpretation.
Courts apply specific tests to determine mensrea in litigation.
The doctrine of mensrea has evolved through Supreme Court precedents.
Understanding mensrea requires analysis of both historical context and modern applications.
philosophy_guard_statement: This fragment describes existing legal doctrines and their applications without advocating for normative changes.
